title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Gerd, Unknown person #1, Children, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss! Miss!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: The children are in an uproar!!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: There's a huge snake in the schoolyard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Jormungandr!! The world serpent that'll end the weak!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There really is a big snake out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it a beast from the realm of the dead? What's it doing in the sun realm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I hope we can get everyone out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But in the meantime the kids are-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry I'm late!! Leave it to me, KIBA!!
